title: Smoked Chicken Skewers with Spanish Flair
description: A fusion of Spanish and Southeast Asian flavors, these smoky chicken skewers are perfect for a summer evening. Marinated in a mix of smoky spices and lemongrass, they're grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Add chicken and lemongrass to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread chicken and lemongrass onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until chicken is cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
